C0.name: Integration Coordinator
completedDeliverables: Repository/package layout (npm workspaces monorepo)
Shared TypeScript types with Zod runtime validation for all 8 domain types
API contract types for all 9 endpoints
Feature flag catalog (6 flags)
Enum definitions (6 enums)
SQL migrations for all 10 tables + RLS policies (11 migrations)
Edge function shells for all 10 endpoints + health-check (deployed and live-tested)
Architecture docs, service boundary docs, API reference, feature flags doc, event versioning doc
52 shared package tests + 65 edge function tests = 117 total tests passing
RLS policies deployed for all 10 tables
CORS headers tightened to match actual accepted methods per function

A1.name: Platform Backend
completedDeliverables: Extended SDK mock with in-memory DB (select, insert, update, delete, upsert, eq, order, limit, single, maybeSingle)
Created _shared/ helpers: cors.ts, auth.ts, response.ts, validation.ts, handler.ts, feature-flags.ts, errors.ts, config.ts, logging.ts
Refactored all 11 edge functions to use _shared helpers (createHandler pattern)
22 SDK mock DB tests + 38 shared helper tests = 60 new tests

A2.name: Identity / Consent / Privacy
completedDeliverables: consent-service.ts: recordConsent, getActiveConsents, revokeConsent
notifications-preferences edge function: POST with Zod validation, upsert to DB
account-delete edge function: DELETE purges user data from 4 tables
12 new tests (consent service + impl tests)

A3.name: Event Store / Persona Snapshot Backbone
completedDeliverables: persona-event-store.ts: appendEvent, getEvents, getLatestSequence
persona-snapshot-store.ts: getSnapshot, upsertSnapshot, createDefaultSnapshot
persona-replay-engine.ts: replayEvents + 7 per-type handlers (applyAction, applyBoostInference, applyLearningAnswer, applyChatExtraction, applyConfirmation, applySystemDecision, applyPersonaEdit)
persona-projections.ts: generateProjections from preference tags
persona-state-manager.ts: applyDelta (atomic persona mutation pipeline)
30 new tests across 5 test files

A4.name: Inventory / Provider Normalization
completedDeliverables: ProviderAdapter interface with fetchItems, transform, validate, dedupeKey
3 mock adapters: events, dining, outdoors
30 Seattle seed items (10 per pillar) with real venue names
inventory-pipeline.ts: upsertInventoryItems, deactivateStaleItems
availability-validator.ts: validateAvailability
New inventory-seed edge function (POST seeds 30 items)
30 new tests across 5 test files

B1.name: Recommendation / Ranking Engine
completedDeliverables: recommendation-service.ts: getCandidates, applyHardFilters, scoreCandidate, applyExploration, applyDiversity, assignConfidenceLabel, buildExplanationFacts, generateFeed
23 new tests in b1/recommendation-service.test.ts

functions.summary: All 11 functions are deployed, active, and serving correctly from the Deno Subhosting runtime. ISSUE-001 (runtime propagation) has been resolved.

bugsDiscoveredAndFixed.title: Edge functions used wrong export pattern
edgeFunctionToken: null causes INVALID_INPUT on deploy

resolvedRevisits.title: Resolve edge function runtime propagation
resolvedRevisits.resolution: ISSUE-001 resolved after redeployment; all 11 functions now serving live

resolvedRevisits.title: Live-test all 10 endpoint shells
resolvedRevisits.resolution: All functions live-tested: correct 401/405/501 responses verified

resolvedRevisits.title: Verify PersonaEvent discriminated union
resolvedRevisits.resolution: 7-variant discriminated union verified correct: literal discriminators, field types, z.discriminatedUnion() well-formed

resolvedRevisits.title: Validate SQL schema alignment with Zod types
resolvedRevisits.resolution: All 7 main tables cross-checked against Zod schemas. Column types, enum CHECK values, nullable fields all align. Structural differences (flat SQL vs nested Zod) are expected persistence-to-domain mapping

resolvedRevisits.title: Add RLS policies to database tables
resolvedRevisits.resolution: 011_rls_policies.sql deployed with 20 policies across all 10 tables. user_id = auth.uid() for user-owned, public read for catalog/config tables

resolvedRevisits.title: Review edge function CORS headers consistency
resolvedRevisits.resolution: Tightened Allow-Methods on 9 functions to match actual accepted methods. Redeployed and tests passing (65/65)

wave2.notes: All Wave 2 agents (A1-A4) implemented. 196 tests passing. Shared helpers, event sourcing, identity services, and inventory pipeline all in place.

wave3.notes: Wave 2 foundation is complete. B1 (Recommendation), B2 (Persona Logic), B3 (AI Layer) can begin.

mergeOrder: A1, A3, A2, A4 (complete - on wave2/foundation branch)
